properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 155/23
 1.EFFECTIVE JANUARY 1ST, 2024, THE ARCTIC NAV- AND METAREAS WILL COMMENCE BROADCASTING THEIR INMARSAT WARNINGS AND FORECASTS USING NUMERIC NAV- OR METAREA IDENTIFIERS.
  
 NAVAREA 19 BROADCASTED MESSAGE 148/23 FROM 08.11.23 TO 15.11.23 AS A TEST USING THE NUMERIC NAVAREA 19 IDENTIFIER TO ABLE MARINERS TO CHECK THEIR INMARSAT-C OR MINI-C RECEIVERS.
  
 VESSELS THAT HAVE RECEIVED MESSAGE 148/23 HAVE INMARSAT-C OR MINI-C RECEIVERS CAPABLE OF RECOGNIZING MESSAGES ADDRESSED USING NUMERIC ARCTIC NAV- AND METAREA IDENTIFIERS AND WILL CONTINUE TO RECEIVE ARCTIC NAV- AND METAREA WARNINGS AND FORECASTS AFTER JANUARY 1ST, 2024.
  
 VESSELS THAT HAVE NOT RECEIVED MESSAGE 148/23 ARE ADVISED TO CONTACT THEIR INMARSAT MANUFACTURER TO ENSURE THAT THEIR INMARSAT-C OR MINI-C RECEIVER RECOGNIZE THE NEW ENCODING PRIOR TO JANUARY 1ST, 2024.
  
 THIS MESSAGE HAS NO RELEVANCE FOR VESSELS WITH IRIDIUM GMDSS RECEIVERS. IRIDIUM GMDSS RECEIVER ARE NOT AFFECTED BY THE CHANGE OF ARCTIC NAV- AND METAREA MESSAGE ENCODING.

 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 148/23
